title: Anna University System Administrator / Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Anna University Recruitment 2026: Anna University has released the official notification for 2 System Administrator / Office Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: System Administrator: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Artificial Intelligence & Data Science or related disciplines. For Office Assistant: Minimum qualification: Pass in 8th Standard.
qualification.details: System Administrator: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Artificial Intelligence & Data Science or related disciplines. Experience in GPU server management, Linux administration, networking, AI/ML computing environments, and system maintenance is desirable. Knowledge in CUDA, virtualization, cloud platforms, and AI infrastructure management will be preferred. Office Assistant: Minimum qualification: Pass in 8th Standard from a recognized school/institution. Good communication and administrative skills. Knowledge in MS Office, documentation, office administration, and record maintenance is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: System Administrator: Rs. 40,000/- per month (Consolidated), Office Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
